action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 25 achieved a new best test balanced_accuracy of 0.5793 using domain_tuned.pkl (a domain-specific ensemble with intercept tuning). We have ~20 minutes and 5 iterations remaining. The predict.py in workspace appears truncated and must be rewritten. Several existing checkpoints were never evaluated, and we can also quickly train new domain-specific ensembles on cached features. Analysis: The highest-ROI move is to (1) rewrite a compact, complete predict.py, (2) run a fast screening script that tests existing untested checkpoints and trains new domain-specific ensembles on individual backbones (DINOv2, ResNet, 3-backbone) with intercept tuning, all using cached features, (3) automatically copy the best validation candidate to best_screened.pkl and evaluate it. This maximizes our chance of finding a better model without slow feature extraction. Decision: Write predict.py and screen_candidates.py, run screening, and submit eval for the best discovered checkpoint.
